revision.text:
Click the button below to create a new project:
{{CreateFromTemplate|preload = Template:CON/Projektvorlage|buttonlabel = Neues Projekt erstellen|macroid = abc12345-def6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890}} __NOTOC__
<!-- From bodyContent 20000030.mraw -->

Link to second space: [[SECOND:Second_Space_Page|Second Space Page]] __NOTOC__
<!-- From bodyContent 20000012.mraw -->

Simple text link: [https://example.com Click here] Link with only ac:image: [https://example.com https://img.example.com/img.png] Internal link: [[wiki/SomePage|text]] Link with span child: [https://example.com content] Link with br child: [https://example.com ] Complex link with span+br+span: [https://example.com AB] Extracted children placed before existing next sibling: [https://example.com child]''next'' Link with nested ac:image inside span: [https://example.com https://img.example.com/img.png] Link with nested ac:image along content: [https://example.com https://img.example.com/img.png]content Link with nested ac:image inside span along content: [https://example.com https://img.example.com/img.png]content Link with content with nested ac:image inside span along content: [https://example.com https://img.example.com/img.png]contentcontent __NOTOC__

Hello from the second space. __NOTOC__
<!-- From bodyContent 20000011.mraw -->

Link to second space: [[SECOND:Second_Space_Page|Second Space Page]] __NOTOC__
<!-- From bodyContent 20000021.mraw -->
